# Scenario: Full buffer render from API message response
# Uses :refresh to load the /session/:id/message response and render all messages.
# This tests the complete render pipeline: user message, assistant message,
# text parts, tool parts (bash pwd, bash git checkout, question).
# Also mocks /question/ API to test pending question popup on refresh.

# (load-file (expand-file-name "../test-helper.el" (file-name-directory buffer-file-name)))
# (load-file (expand-file-name "../opencode-scenario-test.el" (file-name-directory buffer-file-name)))
# (opencode-scenario-run-file buffer-file-name)

:session ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6
:directory /Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el

# Mock the pending question API — server returns the question that has status "running"
:api GET /question 200 [{"id":"que_cc1d20a95001FPv52EFlpM25to","sessionID":"ses_33e2ee637ffeGdTqDXBdDD6xO6","questions":[{"question":"test question","header":"test question","options":[{"label":"test1","description":"Option A"},{"label":"test2","description":"Option B"},{"label":"test3","description":"Option C"}]}]}]

# Load the saved API response and render the full buffer
:refresh multi-tool/messages.json

# --- Assertions ---

# User message text should be rendered
:assert-contains abcdefg

# Bash pwd tool should show the command
:assert-contains pwd

# Bash git checkout tool should show the command and error
:assert-contains git checkout a

# Question inline popup should be displayed (from /question/ API)
:assert-contains Question
:assert-contains test1
:assert-contains test2
:assert-contains test3
